batch.info: Batch mode (-b | --batch) - Closes after executing specific tasks. (`--batch` is not needed when using terminal)
batch.argument.create.info: Creates and installs the server in the working directory with the parameters.
batch.argument.log_process.info: Using the built-in log parsing engine, transforms the data from the pipe into the tab-seperated format.
batch.argument.launch.info: Launches the server instance stored in the working directory (Mention: Must have `server_info.json` in the directory)
gui.info: Graphics mode (-g | --gui) - Enter the full-featured graphics user interface (`--gui` is not needed when using desktop environment)
help.info: Help mode (-h | --help) - Shows the feature and the format of arguments that the program supported
